hits.title: Dysregulation of Protein S in COVID-19.
Anticoagulant protein S-New insights on interactions and functions.
hits.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

hits.title: Protein S as a therapeutic target.
hits.journal: Journal of thrombosis and haemostasis : JTH

text:
Several papers discuss Protein S in the context of thrombosis, deficiency, and its role in COVID-19.

The following literature is available regarding Protein S:

* **Clinical Implications and COVID-19**: Research has explored the dysregulation of Protein S in patients with COVID-19 [PMID:36494145].
* **Function and Interactions**: Studies provide insights into the interactions and functions of the anticoagulant protein S [PMID:32702208], as well as its role in preventing thrombosis [PMID:30683834].
* **Deficiency and Therapeutics**: Literature covers Protein S deficiency [PMID:9198178] and evaluates Protein S as a potential therapeutic target [PMID:41197807].

### Evidence
